name: @parischap/effect-libs
description: effect-libs is a set of open-source libraries to be used in complement to the effect library. Extends some Effect modules (`Array`, `Chunk`, `Option`, `Either`, `String`, ...). Adds extra-functionalities such as date and number parsing/formatting, sscanf/sprintf templating, number rounding, object pretty-printing, colored terminal printing, a simple yet very efficient matcher and a tree with cycle detection
author: Jérôme MARTIN
